title: Humata minuscula
taxonomy: Humata minuscula is classified as a species of plant in the genus Humata, which is a part of the family Arecaceae. This plant belongs to the order Arecales and the class Liliopsida. It is also known to be a member of the family Arecaceae, which consists of various species of palms. Further classification places Humata minuscula in the family Arecaceae and order Arecales, indicating its relation to other palm species. The specific classification provides insight into the plant's evolutionary history and its position within the plant kingdom.
